headline: How A Flat Price Target Is Shaping The Story For Bank Of America (BAC)
summary: Bank of America’s latest analyst update comes with no change to the stock’s price target, leaving investors with the same reference point as before. Even without a fresh price target or new commentary to dissect, there are still useful signals in what analysts are not changing. Read on to see how to interpret a flat price target and how to keep tracking the evolving narrative around Bank of America. Analyst Price Targets don't always capture the full story. headline: Wall Street Analysts Turn Skeptical After Two-Month Stocks Rally
summary: (Bloomberg) -- US stocks may be vaulting from one record to the next, but Wall Street analysts covering them are in no rush to keep up.
